title: helichrysum splendidum
intro: Helichrysum splendidum, also known as the Golden Everlasting or Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum splendidum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-anxiety properties. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
